description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two jobs. The pages job runs on the asciidoctor/docker-asciidoctor image, is limited to the master branch, and executes the commands: asciidoctor -d book -b html5 -a toc rosme.adoc; asciidoctor -r asciidoctor-pdf -d book -b pdf -a pdf-fontsdir=fonts -a pdf-style=rosme-theme.yml rosme.adoc; asciidoctor -d book -b docbook5 rosme.adoc; mkdir public; cp -r images public; cp rosme.html public; cp rosme.xml public; cp rosme.pdf public/rosme-adoc.pdf; fopub rosme.xml; cp rosme.pdf public/rosme-fopub.pdf. It publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. The verify_signatures job runs on the ubuntu:17.04 image and executes: apt update; apt install --assume-yes python-pexpect gnupg2 git; git clone --depth=1 https://gitlab.com/robigalia/meta; gpg2 --list-keys; (gpg2 --export --no-default-keyring --keyring ./meta/.gnupg/pubring.kbx || true) | gpg2 --import; gpg2 --list-keys --fingerprint --fingerprint --verbose; ./meta/verify-signatures.py HEAD ./meta/.mailmap. Both jobs use the default stage and no caches are defined.
